error_detail: M365 Copilot automation known failure. React contenteditable div rejects SendKeys, clipboard paste, and JS injection (3x failures confirmed in prior sessions).
notes: manual_input_required - M365 Copilot (m365.cloud.microsoft/chat) uses React contenteditable that blocks all automation. Previously confirmed 3x failure. CDP (--remote-debugging-port=9222) untested. Skipped per service automation profile.
